content: 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory systems can be reimagined as layered, self-pruning curiosity-driven hierarchies where unused memory slots act as 'unexplored cognitive spaces' that the agent actively prioritizes querying, merging the core logic of state-of-the-art memory architecture with intrinsic curiosity mechanisms. This design lets agents automatically prioritize memory expansion for under-learned task domains without relying on labeled external reward signals.
